title: Stellia Optimized
description: A gameplay+ modpack focused on enhancing survival and automation with smooth performance and balanced features.
body:
Stellia Optimized is a performance-enhance Minecraft modpack designed to deliver the blend of maximized fps and functionality. Whether you're a redstone builder or a regular survival builder or just want the smoothest gameplay possible, Stellia Optimized gives you the best foundation to build on.

# Why Stellia Optimized?
Through countless hours of testing and fine-tuning, this pack bundles the most effective optimization mods available — configured for maximum performance. Unlike regular performance-enhanced modpack, our pack provides extra functionality based on the optifine functions, ranging from building supports to survival supports.

# What features are included?
While the focus remains on performance, our pack also includes several highly requested tools and enhancements that improve the total gameplay experience:

- Distant Horizons – Allowing terrain rendering for breathtaking views

- Essential – Easy multiplayer setup and friend features

- GammaUtil – See clearly in the dark for building and redstone purposes

- Axiom, Litematica, Tweakeroo, WorldEdit – Build faster with advanced editing tools

- ItemSwapper, Peek, Inventory Management - Maximized the sorting efficiency in the inventory while maintaining the vanilla-like experience

- Journey map - Provide a worldmap and minimap which are useful in survival

- IngameIME - Provide ingame supports for different IME without bugs

- FlashBack - Replay your fabulous gameplay

This makes Stellia Optimized ideal not only for players who want raw FPS, but also builders, creators, redstone players, and casual multiplayer players who want smooth performance and helpful tools.
